affected_groups: Families with children currently in or entering 6/8-year grammar-school tracks
Grammar schools operating 6/8-year tracks and their staffing/catchment planning
State school district centres (tankerületi központok) responsible for catchment reassignment
content.decision_question: Stability and protection of settled family arrangements versus the systemic equity goal of reducing early selection
content.evidence_boundary: Unknown/contested: no scenario document specifies whether grandfathering would in practice guarantee zero commute lengthening and zero catchment reassignment, since this depends on concrete implementation design not yet specified in any of the scenarios
content.tension: Families with children already in or entering the 6/8-year track need ironclad felmenő-rendszer (grandfathering) protection and no lengthened commutes or unfamiliar catchment reassignment during any phase-out transition.
content.title: Decision tension A10: S3
value_poles: Stability and protection of settled family arrangements
the systemic equity goal of reducing early selection
